title: Team Mailboxes
description: Named workers coordinate through explicit message passing.

steps.content: Spawn a docs worker and ask it to review the new onboarding section.
steps.annotation: The lead agent coordinates work instead of doing everything directly.
A named worker is created as part of the team runtime.
Stable identities make later routing possible.

steps.content: {"to":"docs-worker","message":"Review onboarding changes and send back risks."}
steps.annotation: Communication travels through an explicit mailbox primitive.
The runtime records who sent what to whom.
Workers and leads inspect inboxes instead of assuming shared hidden state.

steps.content: docs-worker: Risk noted — onboarding still mentions the old chapter order.
The docs worker replied through its mailbox, and the remaining risk is now visible to the lead.
steps.annotation: Team coordination is modeled as explicit communication.
